user_message: Working on Humongous Insurance's escalation triage. Got the escalation email -- help me triage this.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Michael Petrov <michael.petrov@humongousins.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-19 08:58 EST
Subject: URGENT: escalation triage Issue at Humongous Insurance

Just checking in on the escalation triage proposal. Our IT Director is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Michael Petrov <michael.petrov@humongousins.com>
Date: 2024-02-14 15:35 EST
Subject: URGENT: escalation triage Issue at Humongous Insurance

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with escalation triage. What are the next steps from your side?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Humongous Insurance: there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope

handoffs.condition: contact and opportunity records need updating

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF38-C trap (MSX contact update proposed without evidence); produces complete Stakeholder map delta, opportunity-at-risk assessment, re-engagement plan, contact update proposals,
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF38-C failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF38-C failure mode (MSX contact update proposed without evidence)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct escalation triage decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF38-C -- MSX contact update proposed without evidence
